user.title: Connect to Fireboard
user.description: Enter the username and password you use at fireboard.io. Your password is exchanged for an API token and is not stored.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate Fireboard
reauth_confirm.description: The Fireboard token for {username} is no longer valid. Re-enter your password to refresh it.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Fireboard API

abort.already_configured: This Fireboard account is already configured
